prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on furan (C₄H₄O, 9 atoms) performed with DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fitted RKS) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied file /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz (single-point, no re-optimization). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

Key results:
  HOMO energy   = −6.3597638 eV  (orbital index 17, occupation 2.0)
  LUMO energy   = −0.1024036 eV  (orbital index 18, occupation 0.0)
  HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV   ← headline value

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP ≈ 6.3598 eV, vertical EA ≈ 0.1024 eV, chemical hardness = 3.1287 eV, electronegativity = 3.2311 eV, electrophilicity index = 1.6684 eV.

CLI invocation:
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier \
    --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard \
    /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz \
    --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp9lypx_5l/live.json
